prompt: I want you to review the AutoAI app and tell me everything that needs fixing. Be thorough but only flag real issues with file paths.

assertions.text: Output contains an explicit 'Assessment:' line with one of HEALTHY / NEEDS TUNING / HIGH IMPACT
Output has a section header for Architecture (e.g. 'A. Architecture Enforcement' or 'Architecture')
Output has a section header for State Management
Output has a section header for Lifecycle & Memory Safety
Output has a section header for Performance & Stability
Output includes a 'Confirmed Healthy' section listing patterns that were checked and found correct
Output cites at least 3 distinct .kt file paths under app/ or core/ or feature/
Output flags the unbounded mutable list in AiChatViewModel (apiChatHistory) OR a similarly real memory-growth issue with file:line evidence
